name: long-press-capture
_notes: Holds a stationary pointerdown for >5s with capture mode enabled. The press is dispatched at (0.85, 0.05) — outside the book bounds — so main.ts onPointerDown bails before calling stopImmediatePropagation, letting the long-press listener (registered in bubble phase, AFTER main.ts's capture-phase listener) actually receive the event. The long-press timer in src/long-press-capture.ts (HOLD_THRESHOLD_MS=5000) should fire, the canvas should be POSTed to the screenshot-server (vite.config.ts), and a `screenshot-captured` telemetry event should be emitted with sessionId='harness'. Validates PRs #14 and #15 end-to-end. The file-exists assertion accepts either .png or .jpg so it survives the agent-C JPEG→PNG migration.

assertions.description: long-press timer fired, capture pipeline emitted screenshot-captured telemetry with sessionId=harness
Vite screenshot-server wrote a file under contrib/screenshots/ whose sidecar JSON contains sessionId=harness
